accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and accurate CRA context; the substantially-similar-rule prohibition is correct CRA law.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; references to the Congressional Review Act and its effects are accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as nullifying the DOE energy conservation rule for commercial refrigeration equipment.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule is voided under the CRA and the agency cannot reissue a substantially similar rule.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions to summarize.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the resolution took effect upon approval on May 9, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential operative effect: disapproval of the identified rule with no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral and non-partisan throughout.

coherent.why: Well-organized, internally consistent, and clearly written.

concise.why: Brief and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the DOE Office of Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy and the Congressional Review Act.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation, publication date, and approval date all match the bill text.
